entry.title: Mercedes AMG Petronas | Petronas Precision | Formula 1 Wall Art | 4 Piece Set
entry.summary:
Vendor: Posterized
Type: Poster
Price: 297.00 - 387.00 (3 variants)

Engineered for speed. Driven by innovation. Built to compete at the highest level of motorsport.

This premium 4-piece split poster showcases the Mercedes-AMG Petronas Formula One car in a striking top-down composition. Featuring the team's signature black and Petronas turquoise livery, bold typography, and precision-focused design elements, this artwork captures the technological excellence and racing heritage that define Mercedes in Formula 1.

The dark industrial backdrop, glowing turquoise accents, and clean aerodynamic presentation create a modern motorsport centerpiece perfect for any racing enthusiast's setup.


Product Details:

  • 4-piece split poster set
  • Printed on premium 300 GSM matte paper
  • Ultra-high-resolution Formula 1 artwork
  • Sharp detailing with vibrant colors
  • Frame not included

Perfect For:

  • Mercedes F1 fans
  • Formula 1 enthusiasts
  • Lewis Hamilton and George Russell supporters
  • Gaming and workstation setups
  • Modern motorsport room decor

About Mercedes-AMG Petronas Formula One Team:

Mercedes-AMG Petronas is one of the most successful teams in Formula 1 history, renowned for its championship-winning engineering, relentless pursuit of performance, and record-breaking achievements. Combining innovation, precision, and speed, Mercedes continues to be a benchmark for excellence in modern motorsport.


Note: Slight color variations may occur due to lighting and screen settings.

entry.title: Red Bull Racing RB19 | Unleash the Bull | Formula 1 Wall Art | 4 Piece Set
entry.summary:
Vendor: Posterized
Type: Poster
Price: 297.00 - 387.00 (3 variants)

Dominance. Speed. Relentless performance.

This premium 4-piece split poster showcases the championship-winning Red Bull Racing RB19 in a striking top-down composition. Featuring the iconic Red Bull livery, bold typography, and dynamic racing-inspired graphics, this artwork captures the aggressive spirit that made Red Bull one of the most dominant forces in Formula 1 history.

The deep navy background, signature charging bull emblem, and precision-focused layout create a powerful centerpiece for any motorsport enthusiast's space.


Product Details:

  • 4-piece split poster set
  • Printed on premium 300 GSM matte paper
  • Ultra-high-resolution motorsport artwork
  • Sharp colors and premium finish
  • Frame not included

Perfect For:

  • Red Bull Racing fans
  • Max Verstappen supporters
  • Formula 1 enthusiasts
  • Gaming and workstation setups
  • Modern room decor

About Red Bull Racing:

Red Bull Racing has redefined modern Formula 1 with cutting-edge engineering, bold innovation, and multiple World Championship victories. Known for its aggressive racing philosophy and championship-winning drivers, the team continues to set the benchmark for speed, performance, and excellence on the grid.


Note: Slight color variations may occur due to lighting and screen settings.

entry.title: Williams Racing FW46 | Legacy in Motion | Formula 1 Wall Art | 4 Piece Set
entry.summary:
Vendor: Posterized
Type: Poster
Price: 297.00 - 387.00 (3 variants)

A tribute to one of Formula 1's most iconic teams, built on decades of speed, engineering excellence, and racing heritage.

This premium 4-piece split poster features the Williams Racing FW46 in a dramatic top-down composition that highlights the car's sleek aerodynamics and unmistakable racing DNA. The clean white backdrop, motion-blurred wheels, and bold blue accents create a modern motorsport artwork that captures the essence of speed in its purest form.


Product Details:

  • 4-piece split poster set
  • Printed on 300 GSM premium matte sheet
  • Ultra-high-resolution Formula 1 artwork
  • Minimalist racing-inspired design
  • Frame not included

Perfect For:

  • Williams Racing fans
  • Formula 1 enthusiasts
  • Gaming and workstation setups
  • Modern room decor
  • Motorsport collectors

About Williams Racing:

Founded in 1977 by Sir Frank Williams and Patrick Head, Williams Racing is one of Formula 1's most legendary constructors. With multiple World Championships, countless victories, and a legacy of developing exceptional drivers and engineering talent, Williams remains a symbol of determination, innovation, and racing excellence.


Note: Slight color variation may occur due to lighting and screen differences.

Price: 349.00 - 449.00 (3 variants)

A high-performance BMW M5 artwork created for those who appreciate the perfect balance of luxury and power.

This cinematic split poster showcases the legendary M5 in a dramatic performance-focused setting, highlighting its aggressive styling, muscular stance, and unmistakable M heritage. Combining executive luxury with track-inspired engineering, the artwork delivers a striking blend of speed, sophistication, and modern automotive excellence.

Product Details:

Printed on 300 GSM premium matte sheet

Ultra-detailed BMW M5 artwork

Performance-inspired visual theme

Cinematic split panel composition

Frame not included

Perfect For:

BMW enthusiasts

Performance sedan collectors

Automotive wall decor

Gaming and workstation setups

Luxury car lovers

About the Car:

The BMW M5 is one of the most iconic high-performance sedans ever created. Powered by a formidable twin-turbocharged V8 engine and engineered by BMW's renowned M Division, the M5 combines supercar-level performance with everyday practicality. Known for its breathtaking acceleration, advanced all-wheel-drive system, and refined driving dynamics, the M5 continues to set the benchmark for performance luxury sedans around the world.

Note: Slight color variation may occur due to lighting and screen differences.

entry.title: Let The Storm Begin | Formula 1 | 3 Piece Set
entry.summary:
Vendor: Posterized
Type:
Price: 349.00 - 449.00 (3 variants)

A powerful tribute to Max Verstappen's relentless speed, aggression, and championship-winning mindset.

This dynamic Formula 1 artwork showcases Verstappen's Red Bull Racing machine emerging through stormy skies, capturing the intensity, precision, and dominance that have defined a new era of motorsport. The bold vertical composition, dramatic atmosphere, and modern typography create a striking centerpiece for any racing enthusiast's collection.


Product Details:

Perfect For:

  • Formula 1 fans
  • Max Verstappen supporters
  • Motorsport enthusiasts
  • Gaming and workstation setups
  • Racing-themed room decor

About Max Verstappen:

Max Verstappen is one of Formula 1's most dominant drivers, known for his fearless overtaking, exceptional racecraft, and multiple World Championship victories. Driving for Red Bull Racing, he has redefined modern Formula 1 with his aggressive style, consistency, and ability to perform under pressure, becoming one of the sport's most influential competitors.

entry.title: Michael Schumacher | The Red Legend | Formula 1 | 3 Piece Set
entry.summary:
Vendor: Posterized
Type:
Price: 349.00 - 449.00 (3 variants)

A tribute to one of the greatest Formula 1 drivers in history — Michael Schumacher.

This striking motorsport artwork captures Schumacher during his iconic Ferrari era, celebrating the passion, precision, and dominance that defined an entire generation of Formula 1 racing. Featuring bold typography, championship-winning Ferrari imagery, and a clean editorial-style composition, this poster honors the legacy of a true racing legend.


Product Details:

  • Printed on 300 GSM premium matte sheet
  • High-resolution Formula 1 artwork
  • Ferrari-inspired racing aesthetics
  • Modern editorial poster design
  • Frame not included

Perfect For:

  • Formula 1 fans
  • Ferrari enthusiasts
  • Motorsport collectors
  • Gaming and workstation setups
  • Racing-themed wall decor

About Michael Schumacher:

Michael Schumacher is regarded as one of the most successful Formula 1 drivers of all time. With seven World Championship titles and an era-defining partnership with Ferrari, he transformed the sport through relentless dedication, exceptional racecraft, and unmatched consistency. His influence continues to inspire generations of drivers and motorsport fans worldwide.

The Lamborghini Huracán Sterrato transforms the traditional supercar formula by combining a naturally aspirated 5.2L V10 engine with rally-inspired capability. Designed to tackle dirt, gravel, and rough terrain while delivering thrilling performance, it stands as one of Lamborghini's most adventurous and unique creations.

entry.title: Never Too Late to DREAM Jersey | Movie | 2 Piece Set
entry.summary:
Vendor: Posterized
Type:
Price: 198.00 - 258.00 (3 variants)

Bring an emotional, inspiring cinematic vibe to your room with this Jersey Movie – Nani inspired 2 Panel Split Wall Set, capturing quiet determination, grounded emotions, and the timeless spirit of chasing dreams against all odds.
Perfect for bedrooms, desks, studios, living rooms, and gifting, this artwork feels clean, minimal, and deeply relatable, making it a must-have for Jersey fans and lovers of meaningful cinema.

What you’ll receive

1 Set = 2 Panels (split design)

  • High-detail print with rich colors and a smooth poster-style finish

  • Ideal for a wide wall above a desk, study setup, or workspace

Size & finishing note

We print on full sheets and trim white borders manually for a clean finish. Final size may vary slightly due to trimming (±0.5 in).

Installation note

Frames / wall tapes are not included. You can add our wall-stick option at checkout.

entry.title: Hi Nanna | A Love Remembered | Emotional Aesthetic | Movie Posters
entry.summary:
Vendor: Posterized
Type:
Price: 79.00 - 169.00 (4 variants)

Celebrate one of the most heartfelt cinematic moments with this Hi Nanna – A Love Remembered aesthetic wall poster. Designed with soft painterly textures, dreamy tones, and gentle light, this artwork captures the warmth, innocence, and deep emotional connection that defines the film.

Whether you're a fan of Nani, Mrunal Thakur, or simply love soulful romance stories, this poster brings a calming, nostalgic feel to any space. Perfect for bedrooms, study rooms, and creative workspaces, it serves as a reminder of love that heals, memories that stay, and bonds that are never forgotten.

Printed on premium-quality matte art paper, this poster delivers rich colors, subtle details, and a cinematic finish—making it a beautiful addition to your aesthetic room décor.
